recentWorkInspection.command: git status --short && git log --oneline --decorate -10 && git show --stat --oneline --decorate --no-renames -1 HEAD
recentWorkInspection.summary: Latest completed work is commit 2814202, mypage-stat-point-profile-stats. Existing uncommitted docs/plan changes were left untouched as unrelated user work.

harnessTriage.command: Read AGENT.md, docs/agent-feedback.md, docs/user/design-harness-workflow.md, docs/project-context.json, docs/agent-rules.json, and recent commit context
harnessTriage.summary: No reusable Agent-process failure qualified for AGENT.md or Harness policy promotion; recent OVR drift was feature-specific product behavior.

harnessValidate.summary: Harness structure validation was run for this docs/project-context sync.

verificationUnblock.summary: Full Vitest suite passed with one worker after repeated full-suite worker/fake-timer timeouts in unrelated UI tests.

guard.summary: Final harness guard verify was run for this docs/project-context sync. No Local Supabase runtime or browser smoke was required for this docs-only state update.

issuesObserved: The latest completed feature work was still represented as activeWork and needed to be moved into workstreams before the next harness loop.
Full Vitest guard runs repeatedly timed out in different UI tests under parallel workers; single-worker execution passed and was recorded as a verification unblock.
retrospective.reason: The observed item was a routine project-context state sync, and the existing Harness guidance already requires syncing active work before the final guard.
